title: Fittingia conferta
taxonomy: Fittingia conferta is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. It is native to New Caledonia and belongs to the genus Fittingia. Fittingia conferta is classified as a flowering plant, specifically an angiosperm. Its classification also includes it being a dicotyledon, meaning it has two cotyledons or seed leaves in its seedling stage. The species is further categorized as a member of the order Ericales.
